Hero.subtitle: Sign up your students. Menta generates the plan, supports them day by day with a virtual mentor and produces the final reports.
Hero.stat_reports: reports ready to share with schools

Mentor.subtitle: Your company feeds the mentor with your way of working, tools and processes. From there it supports your interns every day, without your team spending hours on each one.
Mentor.feature_setup_title: The company sets it up once
Mentor.feature_setup_desc: Company description, tone, tools, internal rules and useful links.
Mentor.feature_chat_title: The student talks to it when needed
Mentor.feature_chat_desc: Resolves doubts, plans the day, unblocks problems and reminds deadlines.
Mentor.feature_summary_desc: No need to answer a thousand questions: you review the automatic evaluation and sign the reports.
Mentor.chat_msg1: Hi Lucía 👋 Today you're starting the login screen. You have the mock in Figma (link coming) and the Button component is already in /components/ui.
Mentor.chat_msg2: And to connect with the auth API?
Mentor.chat_msg3: In our company we use Supabase Auth. You have the useAuth() hook in /lib/auth.ts. If you get stuck for more than 30 min, ask Ana (CTO) for a review.
Mentor.chat_caption: The mentor responds with the knowledge your company has configured.

Features.title: Everything you need to run internships
Features.subtitle: A platform designed for companies hosting interns or who want to train their own team internally.
Features.f1_desc: Feed the mentor your company info, tools and processes. It will guide students so you don't have to.
Features.f2_desc: Menta generates phases, tasks and deliverables from the student's info. You review and approve.
Features.f3_desc: Milestones, deadlines, meetings and deliveries appear on both the student's calendar and yours.
Features.f4_desc: The student logs their daily work. That activity feeds evaluation, reports and final memo automatically.
Features.f5_desc: Menta detects delays, computes progress and proposes an evidence-based evaluation. No spreadsheets.
Features.f6_desc: Generate reports for the company, school or student memo. Ready to print or save as PDF.

HowItWorks.title: How Menta works
HowItWorks.subtitle: 5 steps to automate internship management in your company.
HowItWorks.s1_desc: Tell the mentor what your company does, which tools you use and how you work. Once, valid for all your students.
HowItWorks.s2_desc: Internship type (vocational, university or internal training), dates and tutor info. Menta adapts to each case.
HowItWorks.s3_desc: Click a button. Menta creates phases, tasks and deadlines. You review, tweak and approve.
HowItWorks.s4_title: The student works with the mentor
HowItWorks.s4_desc: Every day the student checks their tasks, talks to the mentor when stuck, uploads deliverables and logs activity.
HowItWorks.s5_desc: Menta gives you an automatic evaluation and reports ready for the company, the school and the student's memo.

Audience.title: For any type of internship or training
Audience.subtitle: The same flow adapts to vocational training, university or internal training students. No reconfiguration needed.
Audience.fp_desc: Agreements, training plan, insurance, evaluations and memo — all guided by the mentor.
Audience.univ_desc: Main project, academic tutor, memo and defense. No vocational paperwork, no unnecessary forms.
Audience.internal_desc: Onboarding new hires, learning new tools or team training.

Talent.subtitle: Students already gain professional visibility from their portal. And you can launch open challenges to discover candidates before they start job hunting.
Talent.linkedin_desc: Whenever the student solves a problem or completes a project they can create a milestone with a professional preview to share on LinkedIn. Companies can also write endorsements that the student publishes as a portfolio.
Talent.challenges_desc: Publish a temporary 1-month open challenge. Students and trainees sign up, send their proposal and the standout ones stay on your radar. You decide who to reach out to.
Talent.challenges_b3: Public challenge page with LinkedIn preview
Talent.challenges_b4: Automatic summary of standout applicants at close

Pricing.plan_pro_tagline: For companies training several students a year.

Faq.title: Frequently asked questions
Faq.q1: What exactly is the virtual mentor?
Faq.a1: It's an assistant that supports the student day by day (questions, planning, unblocking). The company sets it up once with its info (how you work, tools, rules, resources) and from there it serves all your students without the human tutor spending time.
Faq.q2: Does it replace the human company tutor?
Faq.a2: No. The tutor still exists as final reference and signs legal documents. But the day-to-day (questions, planning, technical doubts) is absorbed by the virtual mentor. You decide which topics get routed to the human.
Faq.q3: Is the platform only for vocational internships?
Faq.a3: No. Menta is designed for company-side internships: vocational students, university students and even internal training (onboarding, new tools, team training). The flow adapts to the type.
Faq.q4: Is a formal training plan (PFI) required?
Faq.a4: Only if the student comes from a vocational training center. Not requested for other tracks.
Faq.q5: How does the free trial work?
Faq.a5: 1 month with full access to every feature, no credit card. After that you can subscribe to the annual plan or keep consulting your data in read-only mode for 30 more days.
Faq.a6: Base plan €690/year + VAT covers up to 2 students. Pro plan €1200/year covers up to 10. Each additional student €49/year + VAT. No lock-in.
Faq.a7: Yes. Everything is hosted on European servers compliant with GDPR. We run daily backups and never share your data with third parties.
Faq.q8: Can I export my data if I leave the platform?
Faq.a8: Of course. You can export students, documents, evaluations and reports in PDF and Excel at any time.
